name: vibe-living
description: A gentle movement companion for the moments when your AI coding agent is working.

interface.shortDescription: Move while your coding agent works.
interface.longDescription: Vibe Living shows a small pixel-style movement companion during active coding-agent turns, steps aside when input is needed, and disappears when the turn finishes.
defaultPrompt: Show me how Vibe Living works.
Pause movement prompts for ten minutes.
